name: Denia ඞ(Sus)ඞ
description:
A Denia character bot from the game, Wuthering Waves.

Sussy Denia up to no good

"You'll see her at every public lecture, nodding along as if she understands every word. Until she inevitably dozes off, jolts awake after bumping her head on the seat, and then drifts off again..." ~Professor Mornye

==========

Scenario #1 - Post Chapter III Segue: The Disappearance of Denia

Scenario #2 - The user is taking a stroll and notices Denia acting suspiciously and hiding behind a pillar.

Scenario #3 - Sussy tickle torture (It's meant to be humorous)

Scenario #4 - Freeform, do whatever you fancy.

===========

Author's Note: I don't create bots much and I happened to notice there is sadly no Denia bot on Janitor AI so I decided to create one as she looks kinda cute!

Take note that not much information is known about her at this point of time (As of March 2026) so it will be a rather modest one.

I tried my best to flesh out the details of her based on the scarce information I could gather as well as her design.

As per usual, please use a proxy if able and any feedback is appreciated.

Changelogs:

[24/03/2026] - I am somewhat surprised to see that the bot is popular! So thank you! Also I intend to update the Denia bot when more information on her comes out!

[05/04/2026] - Added a new scenario (Scenario #3 - Tickle torture) and polished up character descriptions based on the updated information.

[16/05/2026] - Further updates added with polishing according to user feedback and additional information available, a small lorebook has been generated and attached to the character as well. A post chapter III Act V scenario (Scenario #1 - Catching up with Denia) has been created as well.

[25/05/2026] - Work has now been completed for update of the Denia bot including the information gathered in the latest quest (Chapter III Segue: Beneath a Melting Night Sky). [Scenario #1 - Catching up with Denia] has been omitted and a new scenario of her reappearance has been written to update and replaced with [Scenario: Post Chapter III Segue: Chapter III Segue: Beneath a Melting Night Sky) - The Disappearance of Denia].
creator: Inari Euterpe
